summary: Backend smoke + functional tests for TestSeries ecommerce API. 24/24 checks passed: products listing/filtering/search, single product 404, mock OTP flow, admin login (success+401), JWT auth/me, RBAC enforcement (customer->403 on admin routes), full product CRUD, discount code lifecycle (create/validate/one-time reuse blocked), order creation with correct subtotal/discount/shipping calc + free-shipping threshold, customer order isolation (non-owner 403), and admin order status update (valid+invalid 400).
passed: GET /api/products returns 10 seeded products with required fields
GET /api/auth/me with Bearer returns current user
Discount code create + validate (amount); one-time reuse blocked
POST /api/orders calculates subtotal/discount/shipping(49 below 499)/total correctly, marks code used, order_number starts with TS
mocked_apis_verified: /api/auth/customer/request-otp returns OTP in response (mock:true) as expected
